body.title: IDENTITY anchor: Igor-agent vs Pratchett Igor-character
body.result: IGOR_IDENTITY_ANCHOR deposited directly to Postgres (IDENTITY/class/inertia=0.95). Takes effect on next Igor restart.
body.description: After absorbing Making Money, Igor replied with Discworld Igor-character lisp. Fix: deposit durable IDENTITY node (inertia=0.95): Igor the AI agent does not speak with a lisp. The Discworld character Igor is fiction. When retrieving content about a character named Igor, describe in third person. Deposit via cc_send. S-size.
